dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: One of the ships is down!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aghh!! We can't stop them all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: These flames seem a little excessive...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Smash through the Battle- ships' formation !!!
